query: I am basic and the service has already been used, can i get the refund ?
final_response: Please contact our support team for assistance with this request. Thank you for contacting support. We will look into your query.

Thank you for contacting support. We will look into your query.

I understand you're looking for information about a refund, especially since the service has already been used. Our refund policy typically doesn't cover services once they've been utilized, but I'd be happy to look into your specific situation and see what options might be available.
